cockatrice_carddatabase.cards:
Potion
1 1 Artifact // Legendary Artifact - Equipment Artifact
1 Drop (When a card you control destroys a creature, toss a coin. If you call it right, return a random artifact with Drop from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.) {T}: Sacrifice Potion, then chose one — • Regenerate target • Gain 1 life.
Mega-Potion
3 3 Artifact // Legendary Artifact - Equipment Artifact
1 Drop (When a card you control destroys a creature, toss a coin. If you call it right, return a random artifact with Drop from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.) {T}: Sacrifice Mega-Potion, then chose one — • Regenerate target creature twice. • Gain 5 life.
Ether
1 1 Artifact // Legendary Artifact - Equipment Artifact
1 Drop (When a card you control destroys a creature, toss a coin. If you call it right, return a random artifact with Drop from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.) {T}: Sacrifice Ether. Return up to 1 instant or sorcery spell from your graveyard to your hand.
Mega-Ether
3 3 Artifact // Legendary Artifact - Equipment Artifact
1 Drop (When a card you control destroys a creature, roll a D20. If the result was 11 or higher, return a random artifacts with Drop from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.) (When a card you control destroys a creature, toss a coin. If you call it right, return a random artifact with Drop from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.) {T}: Sacrifice Mega-Ether. Return up to 2 instant or sorcery spells from your graveyard to your hand.
Elixir
3 3 Artifact // Legendary Artifact - Equipment Artifact
1 Drop (When a card you control destroys a creature, toss a coin. If you call it right, return a random artifact with Drop from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.) {T}: Sacrifice Elixir. Regenerate target creature. Gain 1 life. Return up to 1 instant or sorcery spell from your graveyard to your hand.
Mega-Elixir
5 5 Artifact // Legendary Artifact - Equipment Artifact
1 Drop (When a card you control destroys a creature, toss a coin. If you call it right, return a random artifact with Drop from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.) {T}: Sacrifice Mega-Elixir. Regenerate target creature twice. Gain 5 life. Return up to 2 instant or sorcery spells from your graveyard to your hand.
AP Up
4 4 Artifact // Legendary Artifact - Equipment Artifact
1 Drop (When a card you control destroys a creature, toss a coin. If you call it right, return a random artifact with Drop from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.) {T}: Sacrifice AP Up. Target creature gains an AP counter. (Activated abilities of this creature cost {1} less per each AP counter on it.)
Power Up
3 3 Artifact // Legendary Artifact - Equipment Artifact
1 Drop (When a card you control destroys a creature, toss a coin. If you call it right, return a random artifact with Drop from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.) {T}: Sacrifice Power Up. Target creature gains a +1/+0 counter.
Defense Up
3 3 Artifact // Legendary Artifact - Equipment Artifact
1 Drop (When a card you control destroys a creature, toss a coin. If you call it right, return a random artifact with Drop from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.) {T}: Sacrifice Defense Up. Target creature gains a +0/+1 counter.
Crafting Recipe
4 4 Artifact // Legendary Artifact - Equipment Artifact
1 When Crafting Recipe enters the battlefield, exile an Artifact card from your deck. When a card you control destroys a creature, create a Crafting Ingredient artifact token. {T}: Sacrifice Crafting Recipe and 4 Crafting Ingredient tokens. Return the exiled card to the battlefield.
Limit Recharge - Drive Recovery
4 4 Artifact // Legendary Artifact - Equipment Artifact
1 Drop (When a card you control destroys a creature, toss a coin. If you call it right, return a random artifact with Drop from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.) {T}: Sacrifice Limit Recharge - Drive Recovery, then chose one — • Remove 1 limit break counter from target creature. • Return a fusion enchantment from your graveyard to your hand.
Limit Pass
M 99 99 Legendary Artifact // Legendary Artifact - Equipment Artifact
1 If you killed 2 opponent this turn you may play this card without paying its mana cost. {T}: Sacrifice Limit Pass. Create an Emblem with “Creatures you control have infinite Limit Break counters.”.
Munny
0 0 Artifact // Legendary Artifact - Equipment Artifact
1 Drop (When a card you control destroys a creature, toss a coin. If you call it right, return a random artifact with Drop from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.) A deck can have up to 5 cards named Munny. If Munny enters the battlefield via Drop, trigger Drop again. {T}: Sacrifice Munny: Add one mana of any color to your mana pool. Use this mana only to cast Artifact spells.
Tokens</-->
